\tzpentry{ID5623}{Pi Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5623 introduces Pi Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$\{q^i, \pi_j\} = \delta^i_j$
\]
